description: Tome and book item definitions — scroll/book spell codes and costs.

Namco.description: Book name completion suffix (e.g. of Identify, of Town Portal)

ScrollSpellCode.description: Item code for the scroll version of this spell

BookSpellCode.description: Item code for the tome/book version of this spell

SkillScrollOffset.description: Skill index offset for scroll spell lookup

SkillBookOffset.description: Skill index offset for book spell lookup

BaseCost.description: Base gold cost of the book item

CostPerCharge.description: Additional gold cost per remaining charge
